title: ourouparia kawakamii
intro: Ourouparia kawakamii is a species of plant in the family Guttiferae, native to Taiwan and China, and is commonly known as the Kawakami ouro-paria. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ourouparia kawakamii include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Ourouparia kawakamii is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
